_doc: Doc allowlist for scripts/check-doc-location.cjs and scripts/public-readiness-audit.cjs. Lists files that are explicitly OK to be tracked in 'mixed' directories (where some files are public-OK and others are private).

root._comment: Repo-root *.md files that are public-facing. Anything else matching a block pattern at root is rejected by the gate.

.ai/._comment: Architecture references only. Audits, plans, debt logs, launch-blocking docs belong in .claude/plans/ (gitignored).

docs/strategy/._comment: Architecture protocols and canonical schemas only. Pricing/tier plans, playbooks, trajectories, audits belong in .claude/plans/.
